rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Or In The Alternative, Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug 14, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC., GILBERT HODGES MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Or In The Alternative, Reconsideration continued to September 4, 2019 on Court's own motion. If parties agree on a different date for a hearing (after September 4, 2019), parties may jointly notify the Court to avoid an appearance solely for the purpose of contesting the new hearing date. The notification may be provided to department 501 at Department501ContestTR@sftc.org no later than 8:00 a.m. on August 14, 2019. = (501/GLW)
